data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Limit choices to improve user decision times by reducing complexity.
data.technical_spec: Design interfaces with minimal necessary options to streamline user paths.

data.title: Fitts' Law
data.description: Design interfaces such that larger buttons and elements are easy to target.
data.technical_spec: Ensure actionable items are sized and placed to reduce error and increase speed.

data.title: Gestalt Principles
data.description: Use visual grouping principles to create a predictable user experience.
data.technical_spec: Apply proximity, similarity, and continuity to organize content logically.

data.title: Law of Proximity
data.description: Group related items close together to imply relationships easily.
data.technical_spec: Layout design should reflect logical grouping through strategic placement.

data.title: Occam's Razor
data.description: Emphasize simplicity in design, removing unnecessary elements.
data.technical_spec: Consistently review designs to ensure essentiality and eliminate clutter.
